Event: The Spartan Adventure
Event Date: 23/04/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: E79
Moment of Power

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, 3 subsequent attacks by the unit become critical, and have a 80% chance to stun targets for 2 sec.

Enhancement: 2
3000 Damage from the gems
Once in a while, 4 subsequent attacks by the unit become critical, and have a 80% chance to stun targets for 3 sec. These attacks additionally deal physical damage equal to 70% / 75% / 80% / 85% / 90% / 95% / 100% of the unit's attack to the target and all enemy units in a small radius around it.

Enhancement: 3
6000 Damage from the gems
Once in a while, 5 subsequent attacks by the unit become critical, and have a 80% chance to stun targets for 4 sec. These attacks additionally deal pure damage equal to 120% / 125% / 130% / 135% / 140% / 145% / 150% of the unit's attack to the target and all enemy units in a small radius around it. The unit also removes the armor of all affected units for 4 sec. These units lose 65% of their armor stats, and become unable to use the armor's abilities for 4 sec.
